children.heading: Medical benefits provided
children.label: a Medical benefits provided
children.text: The United States shall furnish, to an individual receiving medical benefits under this section for an illness, the services, appliances, and supplies prescribed or recommended by a qualified physician for that illness, which the President considers likely to cure, give relief, or reduce the degree or the period of that illness.

These services, appliances, and supplies shall be furnished by or on the order of United States medical officers and hospitals, or, at the individual’s option, by or on the order of physicians and hospitals designated or approved by the President.

The individual may initially select a physician to provide medical services, appliances, and supplies under this section in accordance with such regulations and instructions as the President considers necessary.

children.heading: Transportation and expenses
children.label: c Transportation and expenses
children.text: The individual may be furnished necessary and reasonable transportation and expenses incident to the securing of such services, appliances, and supplies.

children.heading: Commencement of benefits
children.label: d Commencement of benefits
children.text: An individual receiving benefits under this section shall be furnished those benefits as of the date on which that individual submitted the claim for those benefits in accordance with this subchapter.

children.heading: Payment from compensation fund
children.label: e Payment from compensation fund
children.text: The benefits provided under this section, when authorized or approved by the President, shall be paid from the compensation fund established under .section 7384e of this title

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: f Effective date
children.text: This section shall take effect on , unless Congress otherwise provides in an Act enacted before that date.July 31, 2001
